changelog:
> ⚠️ TESTING PHASE — This is a pre-release build. All testing releases use version 0.1.0 regardless of changes. Version 0.1.0 is treated as a rolling release during active development.

## What's Changed

### 🐛 Bug Fixes
- LSPosed hook now respects lsposed_mode=0 config — disable hook without uninstalling module
- 8 empty catch blocks filled with proper Log calls across hook, adaptive manager, overlay, and UI
- Dead optimizeRegions() method removed (superseded by AdaptiveBlockingManager)
- Backup restore filter corrected from .txt to .tar.gz
- Module config path fixed to config/profiles/default.conf
- action.sh APK integrity check via file command before pm install

### 🚀 Features
- Export/Import preset dialogs with user-defined filenames and file picker
- Sync with device Quick Action button now functional (loadConfig + updateUI)
- Run test mode Quick Action button creates/removes test_mode flag with 60s auto-cleanup
- Rolling-release version explanation in About dialog
- Auto-detection sleep timing documented (500/2000/1000ms device-specific tuning)

### ⚙️ CI/CD
- assembleRelease build step with APK artifact upload added to CI pipeline
- Release notes now auto-group commits by conventional-commit type

### Requirements
| | |
|---|---|
| **Root** | Magisk / KernelSU / APatch / SuperSU |
| **Framework** | LSPosed (recommended) or Overlay Mode |
| **Android** | 6.0+ (API 23)

___
### 📥 Requirements
| | |
|---|---|
| **Root** | Magisk / KernelSU / APatch / SuperSU |
| **Framework** | LSPosed (recommended) – or Overlay Mode (no framework) |
| **Android** | 6.0+ (API 23) |
| **Version Code** | 99 |

### 🆘 Support
- **Issues**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker/issues
- **Security**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker/security/advisories
- **Documentation**: https://github.com/Laviesss/InputBlocker#readme
